case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO vs. WOODS, LINDSAY PAULA et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-29-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-29-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO FILE A RESPONSIVE PLEADING, PLAINTIFF TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR, TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AND STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT. HEARING SET FOR OCT-31-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT WOODS, LINDSAY PAULA WOODS, CAREY DOES 1 THROUGH 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-29-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-01-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-09-1994
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
